title: The Gopher’s Squerret Quest in Australia
summary: Kitty and her cat crew embark on a mission to Australia to visit Goofy the Gopher. Upon finding that Goofy has a dry throat, the resourceful team provides him with a sink and water pipe. After exploring Goofy’s root cellar, the crew travels to Perfectly Square Island to fetch "squerrets"—unique square carrots—from Farmer Wobble. The journey culminates in a thrilling, high-speed ride down a spirally tunnel slide.

highlightQuote.text: Do you want to taste a squerret?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hey, we're going to have a sleepover, do you need anything? Mergirls are in pink sleeping bags.
Oh, okay. That sounds very nice. All right, I'm going to turn out the lights.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Hey, is this time for sleeping?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: No, those are socks actually, mergirls.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: We are using them as sleeping bags tomorrow.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: I think that's a great idea.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Dad?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now, mergirls are going to rest, so we should tell our story quietly.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay.
Now they'll be listening to it.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, we can tell a bedtime story to the mergirls. What would they like to have a story about?
Pixie and Pumpkin and Kitty and Figaro and Captain Sumi and all of Kitty's cat crew.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: A story about them?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yes. Bunson and Beaker.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Wow, that's a lot of characters for one story. Do you want to get it started?
Yeah. Once upon a time, Kitty flew to Bunson and Beaker's house and rang the doorbell. Ding dong!
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And Bunson said, "Hello, who is it?"
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Kitty and her cat crew.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: "Oh, Kitty, my friend, and your whole crew. Come on in, everyone." And so Kitty and the whole cat crew went inside...
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: We've got a mission to visit a gopher.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, oh my goodness. A gopher? And who would that be?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: It's just a big one with teeth.
Oh, yes. Gophers do have big teeth. And where does this gopher live?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Down underground.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And what's their name?
Goofy.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Goofy? Oh, I've never met a Goofy, a gopher named Goofy before. I've met other gophers. Well, would you like my help?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes. And Goofy lives in a tunnel in Australia.
Oh my goodness, Australia's far away. How are we going to get there?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: In an airplane, in an airplane, that Kitty's taking.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: All right, Kitty and your cat crew, let's go get on the airplane. And so what did they do next?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: They got on the airplane.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then what happened?
They flew to Australia and then when they got there, they digged to the gopher tunnel.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Izzy
transcript.text: And Kitty says, and Pumpkin says, "Kitty and I have been there before, so this is where the perfect tunnel is. That's where they live, just over there. That's where we're supposed to dig."
And so they dug. They went dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And did Goofy answer?
And suddenly, as they were digging, they popped through into a big open tunnel, and all around it was decorated. It had...
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And then who was there?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Well, they saw a rug, and a bookshelf with lots of little books on it, and a table and a bed, and a cozy chair, and under a blanket sitting in the chair reading a book was a gopher. And the gopher said, "Oh, hello everyone. My name's Goofy."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: "I'm Bunson and Beaker and that's Kitty and her cat crew."
"Oh, nice to meet you. I'm glad you're here because I have a big problem."
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: "What is it?"
"Well, my throat's so dry because I don't have any water to drink."
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: "Then let's go to the stream."
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: "The stream? Where is there a stream?"
"There's a stream over there. Can you drink by yourself? Come on."
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: "I'll have to stay here. Can you bring me back some water from the stream, please?"
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: "Well, there's a sink. There's a sink sink."
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: "You brought a sink with you? That's amazing." And Goofy got up out of his chair and he looked at the sink and he turned the tap and it went squeak, but no water came out. And he said, "Oh, the sink needs to be connected to plumbing where water comes out, but it's not. You'll have to go to that stream and bring me back some water."
"No, I've got this pipe right here that has water in it. There, now... water!"
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: "Oh, I did hear some water. You made the sink work for me," said Goofy. "Thank you." And he went and got a little drinking glass and he poured himself some water out of the sink and then he took a sip and he said, "Ah, wow. I feel so much better already. Well, you're welcome to stay at my tunnel anytime, Kitty and her cat crew and Bunson and Beaker."
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: "And we want to play around."
"Oh, what would you like to play with? We gophers have a lot of toys in our tunnels, as you can see."
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: "Which ones? What are the options?"

"Well, you could try one of my spirally slide tunnels, where you slide down really fast, but then you have to climb back up. Or you could go on an adventure making a new tunnel. Or you could dig up to the surface and see what's around. Or you could go collect some root vegetables, because that's what I like to eat usually."
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: "Well, hey, do you have a root cellar?" says Kitty.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Oh, yes, of course I do. I've got to store my roots to eat. Would you like to see it?"
"Yes, I would."
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: "All right, right this way." And Goofy led everyone down a side tunnel, and it was dark and it led down and down deeper into the underground area, and the soil became cool and the air became chilly, and everything felt pleasantly cold. And after a while, it opened up again into a wider space that was strewn all around with the big knobby shapes of root vegetables, like potatoes and parsnips and rutabagas and other things that grow in the ground.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: "Well, not like my root cellar. When I come up, it opens on my kitchen floor."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Oh, that sounds very convenient," said Goofy.
"If you want to visit, you can visit anytime. Like maybe tomorrow."
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: "Oh, thank you. You know, I've been wishing I had some carrots. Do you know anybody that grows carrots?" said Goofy.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: "Do you want to taste a squerret?"
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: "A squerret? What's that?"
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: "Okay, Farmer Wobble, Goofy the Gopher wants to taste the squerret if you can give me some."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Yes, this is Farmer Wobble. Where does this gopher live?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: "In Australia."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Oh, that's a very far away place from the Perfectly Square Island that I live on."
"Well, we can take an airplane or a boat."
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: "Good idea. Well, I look forward to seeing you here when you visit. Bye-bye now."
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: "Okay, here's some squerrets, Goofy, to taste one."
"Oh, I've never had a carrot that looked like that. Do they taste good?"
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: "They taste delicious."
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And then everyone heard nibble, nibble, nibble, crunch, crunch, crunch. And Goofy said, "Oh, excuse me. I couldn't help myself, it was so delicious. These squerrets are amazing. You'll have to take me to visit Farmer Wobble's farm sometime. But now, it's time for me to take my nap. Thanks for visiting, everyone, and especially thank you for plumbing my sink."
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: "I want to slide down the tunnel."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Oh, well, we can do one quick tunnel. Zoom!"
And they went down the slide and they climbed back up. And this'll be the end of our stars and stories.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And that was the end of our stars and stories.
transcript.speaker: Dad

characters.name: Kitty
characters.description: Isabella’s loyal companion and a valiant superhero, this feline-costumed commander harnesses agile, cat-like powers to lead an intrepid crew through the drifting wonders of Balloon World. Bound by a mission of guardianship, she navigates the whimsical floating realm on daring adventures, rescuing lost treasures and protecting every creature she encounters.

characters.name: Pixie
characters.description: A nimble operative in Kitty’s elite superhero squad, this scholarly feline balances tactical missions and Ginger Catasorry studies with a profound appreciation for restorative slumber. Currently navigating a perilous underground expedition, the talking adventurer greets each waking moment with a signature "Hello, hello," shifting seamlessly from a quiet nap to the sharp-eyed focus required for subterranean survival.

characters.name: Pumpkin
characters.description: A student of Ginger Catasorry and veteran of Kitty the Superhero’s specialized troop, this feline translates the tactical intuition of dark gopher tunnels into rigorous academic study. Despite their combat experience, they harbor a paralyzing fear of being eaten by their subterranean foes—initially trembling at the mere sight of the big gopher—a dread that frequently sends the scholar scurrying to hide between Izzy’s legs for sanctuary.

characters.name: Figaro
characters.description: A sharp-witted scholar of the Ginger Catasorry, this feline hero balances rigorous academic discipline with the street-wise loyalty of Kitty’s superhero troop. Driven by a restless spirit, they are the first to slip into the night in search of adventure, prowling for action while the rest of the crew sleeps.

characters.name: Katsumi
characters.description: A distinguished scholar of the Ginger Catasorry and elite member of the academy’s talking cat crew, this feline has emerged from a long dormancy to join Kitty’s cat troop. Balancing studious discipline with silver-tongued eloquence, they bring the full weight of their feline intellect and the rare gift of speech to the unfolding journey.

characters.name: Cat Crew
characters.description: Kitty’s loyal clowder of feline companions, an inseparable team of friends who serve as her resourceful and steadfast helpers.

characters.name: Bunson
characters.description: A friend of Kitty who lives in a house the crew visits.

characters.name: Beaker
characters.description: A high-strung Muppet and devoted companion to Bunsen, this jittery assistant—and close friend to Kitty—communicates solely through a frantic cadence of staccato "meeps" and "me-me" sounds. Driven by a nervous obsession with their work, they share a home with the scientist, remaining perpetually wide-eyed and sleepless until the day’s experiments reach a successful conclusion, pausing only for the occasional, coveted treat from the local bakery.

characters.name: Goofy
characters.description: A gopher with big teeth who lives in a decorated underground tunnel in Australia.

characters.name: Farmer Wobble
characters.description: A farmer with a comically absurd name who meticulously tends to his harvest of squerrets upon the geometric shores of Perfectly Square Island.

places.name: Bunson
places.description: The starting point of the story where Kitty and her crew visit.

places.name: Beaker's House
places.description: The starting point of the story where Kitty and her crew visit.

places.name: Australia
places.description: A remote country spanning the Big Orange Continent, characterized by the winding labyrinth of the gopher’s tunnel and the amber-lit coastal waters where the Kelp Bass thrive.

places.name: Underground Tunnel
places.description: Tucked behind Goofy the Gopher’s overstuffed armchair and a bookshelf of weathered lore lies a yawning, meticulously carved excavation. This plunging vertical shaft—the very site where industrious moles labored until their claws struck the cold hull of a buried rocket—spirals downward from the cozy retreat as a gateway into a vast and echoing subterranean world.

places.name: Root Cellar
places.description: A chilly underground storage area filled with potatoes, parsnips, and rutabagas.

places.name: Perfectly Square Island
places.description: The home of Farmer Wobble where square carrots are grown.

places.name: The Stream
places.description: Tucked within the lush jungle near the mouth of Goofy’s tunnel, this refreshing basin offers a cool reprieve to any traveler patient enough to follow a local frog's lead. Its mirror-still surface serves as a somber sanctuary where Eeyore retreats on his birthday, spending the hours in quiet contemplation of his own reflection.
